title: [FIRRTL] Module ports get removed even when module is targeted by firrtl.simulation/firrtl.formal

features.name: simulation directive targeting module with ports stripped by optimization
features.description: Code should include a simulation directive targeting a module whose ports are subject to dead code elimination optimization that strips them to zero
features.snippet:
circuit Foo:
  module GrayCodeExhaustive_1:
    input clock : Clock
    input init : UInt<1>
    output done : UInt<1>
    output success : UInt<1>
  simulation GrayCodeExhaustive of GrayCodeExhaustive_1:

features.name: formal directive targeting module with ports stripped by optimization
features.description: Code should include a formal directive targeting a module whose ports are subject to dead code elimination optimization that strips them to zero
features.snippet:
circuit Foo:
  module Bar:
    input clk : Clock
    output result : UInt<1>
  formal ModelChecking of Bar:
